message:
viz: virtualize commit list + fix mobile dock overlap

Performance fix: commit list now uses IntersectionObserver-based
progressive rendering (20 items per page) instead of dumping all
137 commits into the DOM at once. Change group details are lazy-loaded
on first <details> open. Reduces initial DOM from ~8,772 to ~800
elements (90% reduction).

Mobile fix: main content wrapper z-index raised above dock (z-31 > z-30)
so tab buttons and interactive elements aren't blocked by the fixed
bottom dock overlay.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
